title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BUTULAN HIGH SCHOOL TO EDNA GUILLERMO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOSE ABAD SANTOS, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR

chunks.text:
H. No. 1029 / 93 OG No. 3, 327 (Jan. 20, 1997)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8225, November 10, 1996 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BUTULAN HIGH SCHOOL TO EDNA GUILLERMO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOSE ABAD SANTOS, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Butulan High School in the Municipality of Jose Abad Santos, Province of Davao del Su, is hereby changed to Edna Guillermo Memorial high school.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, Lapsed into law on November 10, 1996, without the signature of the President, in accordance with Article VI, Section 27 (1) of the Constitution.
